name: Suggest New Access Point
about: Suggest a public shore/dock/wade/etc. fishing access point missing from the map (for future ETL inclusion or review).
title: "[SUGGEST] "
labels: data, enhancement
assignees: ''
---

**Related to PR 7 GitHub issue template for suggest access (prepares for PR8 moderation path).**

## Suggested Location
- Name (if known, e.g. park or road end):
- Approximate coordinates (lat, lon) or address / description:
- Waterbody:
- access_type guess (bank | dock | pier | wade | road_end | park_shore):

## Why Public / Legal?
(Reference to county/city park map, DNR viewer, signage, etc. Photos strongly encouraged.)

## Source Evidence
- Link to official GIS / park page / DNR:
- Date observed or checked:
- Any facilities / parking / ADA notes:

## Additional Context
- Is this suitable for shore fishing today? Any restrictions observed?
- Nearby known points (for deduping):

**Process note (per PR7 docs)**: This will be triaged into the next quarterly ETL run per docs/ETL-RUNBOOK.md. Maintainer will add to curation list only with verifiable public source. See CONTRIBUTING.md "Data updates / new access points".

We prioritize authoritative public data over user reports.
